## 📋 Description

Briefly describe the changes in this PR and why they're needed.

_Example: "This PR adds OAuth login support via GitHub, addressing issue #42"_

## ✨ Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes an existing issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (updates docs/README)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code cleanup, no functionality change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (requires version bump)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (dependencies, tooling)

Closes #___ (replace with issue number)

## 📋 Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (no linting errors)
- [ ] `npm run lint -- --fix` has been run (formatted code)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings in dev tools
- [ ] No .env secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (ARCHITECTURE.md, API_DOCS.md, etc.)
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Changes are tested and working as expected
